//: Root of the site: the landing page and the ROOT toc.yml. In the DocFX modern
template the ROOT toc renders as the horizontal TOP NAVBAR (via docfx:navrel),
NOT the left sidebar. So the root toc is kept minimal (Home + three product
tabs) and index.md stays at output root as the landing page. The product
subfolders and api/** are excluded here so each is owned by its own nested toc.
LEFT SIDEBAR MECHANISM: the modern template renders a page's owning toc
(docfx:tocrel) in the LEFT SIDEBAR only when it differs from the root toc
(docfx:navrel). We create that difference by OUTPUTTING each product's guides
into its own subfolder (server/ client/ companions/, via `dest`) next to a
nested toc.yml - so every guide page's nearest toc is its product toc, which
the template puts on the left. Source files are NOT moved; only output is
relocated, so relative links and the ../docs single-sourcing are auto-rewritten
by DocFX and keep resolving.
Nested product tocs (the LEFT SIDEBAR trees). These live at docs-site/<product>/
and are mapped WITHOUT `dest` so each outputs to <product>/toc.html - the nested
toc that owns that product's pages. (Adding dest here would double the path to
<product>/<product>/toc.html.)

content.//: SERVER tab - the two local draft pages, output into server/ beside server/toc.html.

//: SERVER tab - single-sourced OhData.AspNetCore guides from ../docs. Everything
except the Client page (client.md), the Companions pages (openapi/nswag.md) and
the contributor-only releasing.md, which is intentionally omitted from public nav.

content.//: CLIENT tab - the single-sourced client guide, output into client/.
COMPANIONS tab - the single-sourced OpenAPI/NSwag guides, output into companions/.
